content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Mar 22, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the introduction of a new plugin, `@elizaos/plugin-spraay-wallet`, and the reporting of an installation issue on MacOS for the ElizaOS CLI.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
No completed work to report for this period.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#316](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/316), was opened to add the `@elizaos/plugin-spraay-wallet`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES
No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
### CLI Installation Issue on MacOS
An active issue, [#6636](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6636), reports that the `elizaos` command is not usable after installation on MacOS. The user noted that a `.js` file is created for `elizaos` but no runnable binary, which is suspected to be the cause of the problem.
